# Container Test Commands

This file records basic commands used to test the reproducible Apptainer/Singularity container for the EBV-MS single-cell RNA-seq analysis.

## Container image

The final container image is:

``` text
EBV_snRNAseq_v4.sif
```

The image is hosted on Docker Hub as an OCI artifact:

``` text
oras://registry-1.docker.io/pantehak/ebv_snrnaseq_v4:v4
```

## Pull container from Docker Hub

``` bash
apptainer pull EBV_snRNAseq_v4.sif oras://registry-1.docker.io/pantehak/ebv_snrnaseq_v4:v4
```

## Test that the container launches

``` bash
apptainer exec --cleanenv EBV_snRNAseq_v4.sif Rscript -e "sessionInfo()"
```

Expected R version:

``` text
R version 4.5.0
```

## Test with project bind path

On Rosalind, project data were stored under:

``` text
/data/menzies_projects/ms-epi
```

The container was tested using this bind path:

``` bash
apptainer exec --cleanenv \
  --bind /data/menzies_projects/ms-epi:/data/menzies_projects/ms-epi \
  EBV_snRNAseq_v4.sif \
  Rscript -e "sessionInfo()"
```

## Example script execution

Example command for running an analysis script through the container:

``` bash
apptainer exec --cleanenv \
  --bind /data/menzies_projects/ms-epi:/data/menzies_projects/ms-epi \
  EBV_snRNAseq_v4.sif \
  Rscript Scripts/DEG_analysis/5_Stimulated_MS_vs_control.R
```

Additional example scripts:

``` bash
apptainer exec --cleanenv \
  --bind /data/menzies_projects/ms-epi:/data/menzies_projects/ms-epi \
  EBV_snRNAseq_v4.sif \
  Rscript Scripts/MS_signature/3_Pheatmap_hierarchial_clustering.R
```

``` bash
apptainer exec --cleanenv \
  --bind /data/menzies_projects/ms-epi:/data/menzies_projects/ms-epi \
  EBV_snRNAseq_v4.sif \
  Rscript Scripts/Clustering/4_feature_plots.R
```

## Notes

The bind path should be modified if the data are stored in a different location.

For example, if the project data are stored in `/path/to/project`, use:

``` bash
apptainer exec --cleanenv \
  --bind /path/to/project:/path/to/project \
  EBV_snRNAseq_v4.sif \
  Rscript path/to/script.R
```

The `renv.lock` file is included in the repository to document R package versions, but the full reproducible environment is provided by the Apptainer container.
